channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-2172] osc_req_attr_set LBUG
item.description:
Hit this during racer (I have a crashdump.

[ 7117.925390] LustreError: 10095:0:(ofd_obd.c:1222:ofd_create()) unable to precreate: -28
[ 7117.926037] LustreError: 25708:0:(osp_precreate.c:275:osp_precreate_send()) lustre-OST0001-osc-MDT0000: can't precreate: rc = -28
[ 7137.870166] LustreError: 31220:0:(osc_io.c:797:osc_req_attr_set()) page@ffff88002d9efef0[1 ffff88000b8b1f88:0 ^(null)_ffff88008de9eef0 2 0 1 (null) ffff88004134f928 0x0]
[ 7137.870994] LustreError: 31220:0:(osc_io.c:797:osc_req_attr_set()) page@ffff88008de9eef0[1 ffff88009b226f98:0 ^ffff88002d9efef0_(null) 2 0 1 (null) (null) 0x0]
[ 7137.871843] LustreError: 31220:0:(osc_io.c:797:osc_req_attr_set()) vvp-page@ffff88008fe26548(0:0:0) vm@ffffea0001aa5f00 2000000000282c 2:0 ffff88002d9efef0 0 lru
[ 7137.872829] LustreError: 31220:0:(osc_io.c:797:osc_req_attr_set()) lov-page@ffff88002b63ec50
[ 7137.873346] LustreError: 31220:0:(osc_io.c:797:osc_req_attr_set()) osc-page@ffff88004fb15f08: 1< 0x845fed 258 0 + + > 2< 0 0 5 0x5 0x520 | (null) ffff880040880cf0 ffff8800924a6eb0 > 3< + ffff8800701b4180 1 1 0 > 4< 0 0 8 901120 - | - - + - > 5< - - - - | 0 - | 0 - ->
[ 7137.874470] LustreError: 31220:0:(osc_io.c:797:osc_req_attr_set()) end page@ffff88008de9eef0
[ 7137.875013] LustreError: 31220:0:(osc_io.c:797:osc_req_attr_set()) dump uncover page!
[ 7137.875514] Pid: 31220, comm: dd

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment: duplicate of LU-2170
duplicate of LU-2170
Probably related to somewhat similar LU-1650
Probably related to somewhat similar LU-2094
